S3 E1 A high-paced, tension-filled premiere. When Elliot's drug shipment is spiked, rocking the Gangs and causing hundreds of deaths, the hunt is on for who is responsible.

S1 E4 Call Me Red
Dexter attends a mysterious gathering, hosted by a highly influential figure with macabre ambitions. Harrison continues to struggle with mounting guilt and pressure at work.
S1 E7 Tragedy forces a young Carrie down a dark path. Years later, a chance encounter with a young Milo leads her to fixate on the boy.
S1 E8 A chilling finale. As the Irvines reel from the home invasion, Marissa begins to understand how Carrie was linked to them. She confronts Peter about the past and pushes him to confess.

S1 E4 So Be It
Crowned heads are endangered as Harold fights for his family's rights and William tracks his royal foe.

S19 E24 Rumpus Room Week
The teams are super busy getting creative at a challenge, finishing their spa rooms whilst keeping their rumpus rooms on track.
Steve Carell lends his voice talents to this epic animation. A criminal mastermind uses a trio of orphan girls for a grand plan, but he soon finds that they are changing him.

S19 E24 Rumpus Room Week
The teams are super busy getting creative at a challenge, finishing their spa rooms whilst keeping their rumpus rooms on track.

S2 E8 After receiving tragic news, Jake refuses to give up on a beloved patient, landing himself in conflict with several Westside surgeons. When Amy's neuro tests elicit memories of Danny, she pushes herself too far.

S1 E8 A Race To The Fortune
The finalists tackle two dramatic challenges and face big decisions that could change their lives forever.

S1 E5 Suffer The Children
Danny and Lena take on a high-stakes murder case that leads to one of Boston's most infamous unsolved crimes. Meanwhile, tensions rise within the Silver family.

S3 E6 Bunker Down
When a crisis manager vanishes inside a billionaire's panic room, Elsbeth unravels the highly equipped fortresses that blur the lines between security and paranoia.

S1 E1 Financial Crutch
This series premiere is filled with surprises. Crutch throws a rooftop party to celebrate his son Jake's success, but the celebration brings more surprises than he can handle.

S1 E2 Crazy Crutch
Crutch starts acting suspiciously when questions arise about his contact with Jamilah's husband, while he and Jake adjust to life under the same roof.

S5 E9 It's A Wonderful Christmas Carol: Part One
Sam's big Christmas Eve TV interview with Walter Storm takes an unexpected turn. Meanwhile, Trevor and Patience bond over their mutual disinterest in celebrating Christmas.

S5 E10 It's A Wonderful Christmas Carol: Part Two
Sam gets a glimpse of what her life would be like if she could never see the ghosts.

S19 E24 Rumpus Room Week
The teams are super busy getting creative at a challenge, finishing their spa rooms whilst keeping their rumpus rooms on track.

S1 E17 Bruce-Ic And The Mus-Ic
At the annual fundraiser, Alex and her husband, Tim, try to have a wild, kid-free night, Ron and Joyce butt heads over hosting duties.

S1 E18 This Place Is Our Everything
A highly-charged finale. A storm causes chaos in the Emergency Department, Alex is torn between an obligation to her husband and her co-workers' needs.

S1 E6 Exit Interview
When a body is discovered along the Eel River, Mickey and her team launch a homicide investigation that rattles the heart of Edgewater.

S17 E26 Immunity Pressure Test: Ice Cream
The winning contestants from the last mystery box challenge have to create their own pressure test in two hours, inspired by the different flavours of Conossieur ice cream.

S7 E4 Doubted
When the sister of FBI Behavioral Analysis Unit profiler Sydney Ortiz is the victim of an attempted kidnapping and sexual assault, Sydney seeks help from Isobel and the team.

S19 E25 Rumpus Room Week
The winners of The Spa challenge are over the moon as they win a $260,000 caravan to sell with their house at auction.

S2 E10 Now You Don't
Alec brings Rose on a date to a magic club he frequents, where a friend is the headliner. The evening turns deadly when an audience volunteer is inexplicably killed on stage, and seemingly by magic.

S13 E10 Faith
Torres investigates the conspiracy surrounding the Morgan case, leading Intelligence into a tangled web of secrets.

programmes.t: Cruel Love: The Ruth Ellis Story
programmes.d:
S1 E3 Abbott
Found guilty and sentenced to hang, Ruth reflects on her relationship, lost dreams, and pregnancy, as her lawyer pressures the Home Office for a reprieve.
S2 E3 Glen is left reeling from an old home video he finds, leading to a bust-up between him and Lee. Meanwhile, Kirsty brings her newfound bedroom persona to work.
Mr. Bigstuff.
Dexter: Resurrection.
Red Eye.
Tulsa King.
Chicago Med.
The Block Australia.
An action-packed Vietnam War thriller. A small outpost gets ambushed during the war, prompting a US Army squad to take the battle below ground on a high-stakes mission.
In this military action, Megan Fox takes up arms to fight for survival as she leads a band of mercenaries on a risky mission to rescue abducted girls in Africa.
Based on the true story of a family's journey from Down Under to centre stage. A mother's faith stands against all odds and inspires her husband and children to hold on to theirs.
A canine space adventure. Two children and their parents help a trio of aliens who are transformed into friendly dogs to escape the clutches of a UFO hunter.
The late Oscar-winning director William Friedkin adapts Herman Wouk's Pulitzer Prize-winning novel. A young lieutenant is accused of mutiny against his captain.
A satirical comedy. A man is recruited by a secret magical society of black people. Their important cause? Making white people's lives easier.
Zachary Levi stars in this heartfelt, inspiring film based on a real-life story of a family's struggles and triumphs as they care for their autistic son with brittle bone disease.
A beautifully animated Oscar-nominated adventure for adults and kids. This time, Hiccup and his dragon Toothless discover a hidden ice cave that's home to hundreds of new dragons.
Wrestler-turned-actor John Cena stars in this funny family comedy. When an elite firefighter team rescues three siblings, they face a task that they are not ready for: babysitting.
Tim Robinson and Paul Rudd lead this dark comedy about an awkward man trying to be friends with his charismatic neighbour. When the neighbour ends the friendship, he spirals out of control.
Scott Eastwood and Jamie Foxx face off in this star-studded action thriller. A former disciple wages a desperate battle to stop a cult leader whose rising movement endangers the force.
This compelling and star-studded film, inspired by a photo book by Danny Lyon, follows the rise and transformation of a Chicago-based biker gang into a dangerous gang in the 1960s.
Charm and wit take centre stage as Brett Goldstein (Ted Lasso) ditches his Roy Kent edge to deliver a hilarious stand-up debut.
Charm and wit take centre stage as Brett Goldstein (Ted Lasso) ditches his Roy Kent edge to deliver a hilarious stand-up debut.
An intense action thriller. A young woman is swept off her feet by a mysterious stranger who promises her a romantic boat trip. What follows is deceit, mistrust and violence.
Kristen Stewart earned an Oscar nomination for portraying Princess Diana in this true story-based film about when she divorced Prince Charles during the Christmas holidays.
This disaster thriller puts you right in the eye of the storm as a tornado rips through a town, forcing people to seek shelter in 13 minutes. Four families must unite in the aftermath.
Retroactively dubbed 'Yacht Rock', this documentary chronicles the world of soft rock in the late 1970s and early 1980s.
After an acclaimed, extended run on Broadway, comedian Alex Edelman brings his solo show to HBO in an all-new comedy special.
A lively, warm-hearted fantasy comedy. Harold, whose magic crayon brings everything he draws to life, ventures into the real world after he draws himself off the page.
This third instalment of the iconic franchise, starring Sam Neill, sees a doctor being tricked into returning to the dinosaur-run island to help save a missing child.
A starry voice cast propels this epic modern reboot. When Papa Smurf is abducted by the evil wizard siblings, Smurfette and the other Smurfs travel to the real world to rescue him.
Dennis Quaid leads this captivating biopic about the 40th President of the United States, Ronald Reagan. Delve into his childhood, acting career, and rise to leader of the US.
Josh Hartnett propels this tense M. Night Shyamalan thriller. A father and his daughter attend a concert, but all is not as it seems, as it's a trap set to find a serial killer.
The animated classic gets a live-action adaptation. As an ancient threat endangering Vikings and dragons emerges, Hiccup's friendship with Toothless becomes the key to forging a new future.
Conflict can't escape Bob Odenkirk, who returns as Hutch Mansell, the unassuming suburban dad. This time, he must protect his family during a vacation.
Absolution.
Absolution.

S1 E1 Monkey Love
A riveting premiere. Former nurse-turned-exotic animal broker Tonia Haddix fights to retain custody of her 'kids', seven chimpanzees at the Missouri Primate Foundation.
An eerie and sinister horror unlike any other. A late-night talk show host in the 1970s plans a Halloween special, unaware he is about to unleash evil into people's living rooms.
There's nowhere to hide in this action movie. A burned-out professional sniper is trapped in an all-glass penthouse by a lethal competitor and must find a way to survive.
A faith-based biopic about Duck Dynasty star Phil Robertson. Long before fame, Phil falls in love and starts a family, but his demons threaten to tear their lives apart.
Ben Kingsley is funny and compassionate in this sci-fi film. A widower gets an unexpected visitor that turns his life and that of his two neighbours into an exciting adventure.
Frankie and Felipé are two brothers who were separated as children and later meet again under some weird circumstances.
An edgy, dynamic UK dance film. Two estranged teenage brothers, gifted at breakdancing, try out together for the British breakdancing team to compete in the World Championships.
A dramedy starring Nick Jonas that deals with grief and reconciliation. Renn returns home for his mother's funeral, where he makes new relationships while healing old ones.
Jim Carrey becomes an unlikely hero in this third instalment. When Team Sonic meets their match in Shadow, they must form an unlikely alliance with Dr Robotnik to save the world.
Jenna Ortega stars in this heartfelt romantic film. A chance meeting between two very different teenagers changes their lives forever.
Anthony Hopkins is diabolical in this intense and twisted thriller about a thief who breaks into the wrong luxury SUV. He finds himself trapped and fighting for survival.
Scarlett Johansson leads a starry cast in this high-stakes seventh instalment. A team of skilled operatives seeks to extract dinosaur DNA for a medical breakthrough.
Terror meets its match in Rebel Wilson in this chaotic action comedy. When a mercenary team hijacks a wedding, a secret agent bridesmaid fights to save the day.
Babes.
Babes.

S1 E2 Gone Ape
PETA launches an investigation after a former Hollywood chimp named Tonka goes missing. It's a high-stakes legal battle, particularly in light of a brutal chimp attack years earlier on a Connecticut woman.
A gripping whodunnit murder mystery. A young woman goes to confront her cousin about cheating with her boyfriend, only to find her dead, and everybody is a suspect.
A gripping action thriller. Jason Cole, an FBI Agent, appears to have it all until his past rears its head and propels him into a situation he could not have prepared for.
Inspired by the classic tale of Peter Pan, but with a feminist twist. Four generations of Darling women struggle with the aftermath of their adventures in Neverland.
This incredible documentary tells the story of Rebecca Nagel, whose car accident left her an L1 paraplegic. She became the first female to complete a half marathon trail event.
A cheerful animation based on a German fable. When three Elfkins leave their underground world to explore the human world, they end up helping a struggling baker save his shop.
Zachary Levi stars in this heartfelt, inspiring film based on a real-life story of a family's struggles and triumphs as they care for their autistic son with brittle bone disease.
Michael Keaton reprises his iconic role. A family tragedy brings Lydia Deetz back to Winter River, where her daughter discovers the portal to the afterlife, upending Lydia's life.
Forrest Gump stars Tom Hanks and Robin Wright are reunited for this quirky yet emotional drama. Follow the lives of multiple generations who have lived in the same home over a century.
The Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat is about to have a wild outdoor adventure! An unexpected reunion with his long-lost father - scruffy street cat Vic.
Chris Pratt and Bryce Dallas Howard return for another Jurassic adventure. When the island's volcano erupts, the pair launch a dangerous rescue mission to save the dinosaurs.
The second instalment in an epic two-part adaptation of Frank Herbert's acclaimed novel. Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a warpath of revenge.
Scott Eastwood and Jamie Foxx face off in this star-studded action thriller. A former disciple wages a desperate battle to stop a cult leader whose rising movement endangers the force.
Dangerous Animals.
Dangerous Animals.

S1 E3 Head Shot
Actor Alan Cumming adds $10,000 to a reward for Tonka's whereabouts, and the film crew faces an ethical dilemma as parallels are drawn to a previous PETA case that took a dangerous turn in Oregon.
An intense action thriller. A young woman is swept off her feet by a mysterious stranger who promises her a romantic boat trip. What follows is deceit, mistrust and violence.
A dark and twisty psychological thriller. A woman in an abusive relationship reaches out to her estranged friend with an unexpected, life-altering proposition.
This enthralling HBO documentary explores one of the world's greatest modern mysteries. Cullen Hoback investigates the origins of Bitcoin and its anonymous creator, Satoshi Nakamoto.

S6 E22 Visions Of Daphne
To Niles' delight, a series of psychic visions gives Daphne second thoughts about marrying Donny.

S6 E23 Shutout In Seattle Part 1
Despondent over Daphne's engagement, Niles takes a walk on the wild side with a funky waitress from Café Nervosa.

S6 E24 Shutout In Seattle Part 2
The love lives of Frasier, Martin, Niles and Roz come crashing down around them.

S3 E3 Fat Cuz
The guys call on Adam's overweight cousin to get special parking privileges.

S3 E4 To Kill A Chupacabraj
The guys go up against Montez in small-claims court.

S3 E5 Good Mourning
The death of a coworker sends the guys into mourning.

S3 E6 The Meat Jerking Beef Boys
A visit from Ders' dad puts the guys' friendship to the test.

S3 E7 The Lord's Force
Two members of a strongman group with a religious bent, are welcomed into the guys' home with open arms.

S1 E9 See Dad As The Great And Powerful Hobbs
When David and Amy learn their security system has a surveillance feature and they allow Emily to have a party, they must decide how much supervision they want to have.

S1 E10 See Dad Get Wah-Wah'd
Marcus asks David to help him recruit Ricky, the young actor who played David's TV son, to star in Marcus's next project.

S3 E36 Attack of the Bug Man
While Kenan & Kel are busy playing a game in Kenan's room, the Rockmores' house is robbed by the mysterious Bugman.

S5 E1 The Crash!
Comedian Darren Harriott narrates this week's family-friendly fails - the art of how not to take a selfie and who's more ridiculous: skaters or free-runners.

S5 E2 The Scream!
Darren Harriott narrates a fresh batch of the funniest clips out there. This week's fails brings internet challenges gone wrong.

S5 E3 The Splash!
Darren Harriott narrates a fresh batch of family-friendly fails. We'll show you the whackiest inventions and find out which is more ridiculous - hoverboards or unicycles.

S2 E19 See Dad See Joe Sleepwalk
Joe is sleepwalking due to nerves about kissing Amanda for the first time. However, David thinks he's nervous about a fight at school and later gives him terrible first-kiss advice.

S2 E20 See Dad Run Until He Drops
Marcus' wife, Alicia, arrives home from Europe surprising everyone with her new look but the Hobbs can't keep up with their friend's new lifestyle!

S8 E11 Gambling N'Diction
After convincing her that they could make a fortune, Doug and his mum set off on a run of poker games to come up with the buy-in to for a high-stakes game.

S8 E14 Apartment Complex
Doug and his gang rent an apartment upstairs from their favourite restaurant, but when the excitement of having their own secret sanctuary wears off, the guys stop hanging out, leaving Doug all alone.

S8 E15 Buggie Nights

A woman keeps calling Doug's house claiming to have spent a romantic weekend with him, but Doug has no idea who she is and tries to find a way to stop her from calling.

S2 E20 Indecent Proposals
Melanie asks whether women can have sex with 'no strings attached', which leads the ladies to try to find one night stands.

S2 E21 Clip Show
Highlights featuring the funniest and most memorable moments from this season.
S3 E4 Melanie, Victoria and Joy give make-overs to their neighbours. Elka tries to keep up with her new, younger man.
S5 E14 Linda overhears one of John's phone conversations that leads her to believe that John is on drugs. The rest of the group tries to get to the bottom of it.

S5 E3 The Splash!
Darren Harriott narrates a fresh batch of family-friendly fails. We'll show you the whackiest inventions and find out which is more ridiculous - hoverboards or unicycles.

S1 E13 The Misery Chick
With the prom approaching, Daria finds a sudden and unexpected surge in popularity.

S22 E8 Buddha Box
Cartman is diagnosed with anxiety.

S2 E6 Adam Gets Neighbourly
Adam and Andi try to get back in their neighbours' good graces after no one shows up to their potluck dinner.

S8 E10 Raygin' Bulls
When Doug runs into his old pal Ray Barone and both wives happen to be out of town, they decide they're long overdue for a guys' night out.

S8 E12 Fresh Brood
When Doug is not allowed to hold Danny's girlfriend's baby, Doug gets annoyed and tries to convince Carrie to have a child so he can get back at Dan.

S6 E13 Meat Wars
See the often confusing phases of relationships through the sometimes blurred vision of a recently engaged couple.

S6 E14 Goodbye Dolly
Audrey tries to prepare for motherhood by continuing to repair a doll that she keeps damaging. Meanwhile, Jeff questions Brenda's dating choices.

S5 E21 Mr And Ms Conception
John is frustrated with a couple who seek counselling on conception and keep misinterpreting his advice, and Chris flirts with a fire marshal to avoid a ticket.

S5 E5 The Grand Gesture
After trying the casual approach to getting Chris to go out with him, Becker takes Margaret's advice and asks her to go out with him on a bona fide date.

S3 E8 God and Football
On Elka and Betty's 90th birthday, Melanie takes her to the Browns' locker room. She ends up dating a player, and Joy and Elka get surprising medical news.

S3 E9 Love Is Blind
Victoria's daughter Emmy is back with surprising news - she's engaged to Melanie's son Will! Joy's dating a blind man who thinks she's 26, and Elka is prank-calling a certain Yankee 3rd baseman.

S7 E4 Cupcake
Jeff thinks he's having a heart attack after he unknowingly eats a cupcake that contains marijuana and Timmy scores with a 'cougar' while being forced to work as Russell's 'rodeo clown.'.

S7 E2 Taking Names
Jeff and Audrey realise that the names on their baby list are also the names of women that Russell has slept with. Adam becomes a cycling enthusiast after Jennifer suggests they start riding bikes in the park.

S2 E7 We Can Be Heroes
Adam and Andi get caught off guard by unexpected expenses, so they each decide to give up a luxury to pay them off.

S2 E2 Andi's Boyfriend
When Adam finds out that the pastor that officiated his wedding was a fake and that he and Andi aren't really married, he hurries to find a way to fix it before Andi finds out.

S5 E18 Amanda Moves Out
John finally quits smoking but no one notices. Jake finds out that his girlfriend has been cheating on him.

S5 E15 Nightmare On Becker Street
John's neighbour takes a liking to him and won't take no for an answer. Linda decides to stop lying to her boyfriend but is surprised by his reaction.

S6 E15 Audrey's Shower
Jen volunteers to throw Audrey a baby shower but puts the wrong date on the invitation. Meanwhile, Jeff likes Audrey's maternity clothes, and Russell accomplishes great things.

S7 E1 Cats & Dogs
See the often confusing phases of relationships through the sometimes blurred vision of a recently engaged couple.

S3 E5 One Thing Or A Mother
The ladies throw a dinner party to remedy their date dilemmas: Joy's dating a man of indeterminate age, Victoria's seeing a hand model, Sean and Melanie's guy resembles Winnie the Pooh.

S4 E13 Tales from the Clip
The comedy keeps on coming, as Kenan & Kel reminisce about their years of friendship and the crazy schemes they got themselves into.

S4 E14 Two Heads Are Better Than None - Part 1
The Rockmores set out on a family road trip with an uninvited Kel stashed in the trunk. While camping out in the woods, Kenan has a scary encounter with a mysterious, shadowy figure...

S3 E3 Slave Fight
A biracial man tries to impress his date. Hoodlums run into trouble before a big job. Slaves can't wait to leave an auction. Two men hide from a white supremacist.

S4 E20 The 420 Special
Neil deGrasse Tyson relaxes at home, Keegan endures a job interview, a tailor has a gassy client, the valets discuss 'Game of Thrones', a new strategy for telemarketing.

S3 E11 Thug English Actor
Sketches include Keegan and Jordan eavesdropping on white women who love black men, Wendell making a music video, and Kareem and Jahar going to the gym.

'S9 - Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina'. Mr Garrison goes to great lengths to get what he's always wanted - a sex change. As he enjoys his new womanly attributes, the rest of the town gets in touch with their inner feelings too.

S9 E2 Die Hippie, Die
There's a mass influx of hippies coming into South Park and Cartman is intent on putting a stop to them.

S2 E4 G.I. Twayne
Twayne is drafted into the Army of Satan - when Mark is forced to join him, he discovers a plan to end humanity.

S9 E4 Best Friends Forever
Kenny is the first kid in South Park to get the new PlayStation Portable, a device that was created to determine who has the best skills to defeat the armies of Satan.
Butters is freaked out when he thinks he can communicate with the dead. Even though his parents have made it clear to him there are no such things as ghosts, Butters is sure one is haunting him.

S9 E7 Erection Day
Jimmy is having trouble controlling his body and it seems like it could hurt him in the school's big talent show. So, he goes on a journey to 'fix' the problem.

S4 E10 Probably Part 2
Cartman becomes an evangelical preacher when the boys break off from their church as the feud between Saddam and Chris continues.

S5 E8 The Wall
Deputies Junior and Garcia volunteer to build a section of the wall at the Mexican border, but end up on the wrong side.

S7 E20 To Thine Old Self Be True
Frasier's budding romance is complicated by a stripper. Maris tries to sabotage Niles' new relationship.

S7 E20 To Thine Old Self Be True
Frasier's budding romance is complicated by a stripper. Maris tries to sabotage Niles' new relationship.

S7 E21 The Three Faces Of Frasier
Frasier's delight at having his caricature displayed in a famous local landmark dissolves once he sees the unflattering portrait.

S7 E22 Dark Side Of The Moon
The arrival of Daphne's obnoxious brother, Simon, unleashes an emotional torrent that drives her into therapy.

S7 E23 Something Borrowed, Someone Blue Part 1
Just when Daphne decides to profess her love for Niles, he drops a stunning bombshell.

S4 E3 Old Ladies And Satan
Two old women battle with Satan, things go awry when a man goes mattress shopping, and dance club patrons are forced to face the truth about themselves.

S4 E4 Slap-Ass: In Recovery
A baseball player deals with his addiction to slapping ass, a mobster takes vengeance on someone who crossed him, and Steve Urkel drives a man insane.

S1 E4 Paperwork
Nora attempts to cash a cheque to pick her car up from an impound lot, only to discover that her bank has closed her account.

S5 E9 The Bang!
Comedian Darren Harriott narrates the funniest clips out there. This week's family-friendly fails include how not to get on a ski lift and some incredible near misses.

S5 E10 The Smash!
Comedian Darren Harriott narrates this week's family-friendly fails. We'll bring you our countdown of the biggest show-offs on the internet, plus some of the worst footballers ever.

S5 E11 The Fart!
Comedian Darren Harriott narrates this week's family-friendly fails. Expect out-of-control motorists, amateur modelling mishaps, and our guide to walking on ice.

S5 E12 Woof!
Darren Harriott narrates the funniest clips out there. Snowboarders go head-to-head with skiers and we show you how to fall in style. This episode is brought to you by our sound of the week - woof!

S1 E16 See Dad Get Schooled
When Joe wants to participate in his school's father/son history bowl competition, David realises he doesn't know anything on the subject and learns he never actually passed history in school.

S1 E17 See Dad Campaign
David tries to help Emily win a class election when she competes against the son of his enemy, and Emily and Amy surprise him with a tactic they use.

S1 E18 See Dad Get Attacked By Promzilla
When Amy has to work the weekend Emily and Mary are getting ready for Prom, dress shopping duties fall on David and Marcus, who let things spiral out of control.

If you love Jason Statham, you will love him in this high-octane action film. In the not-too-distant future, a reality TV show uses prisoners in a deadly race for entertainment.
The creator of The Professional and Lucy, Luc Besson, delivers his brand of powerful, stylised action with deadly precision. Follows the chaos left by a lethal government assassin.
The creator of The Professional and Lucy, Luc Besson, delivers his brand of powerful, stylised action with deadly precision. Follows the chaos left by a lethal government assassin.
Starring Ben Foster and Michael Caine, this is an epic take on the true story of Jan Žižka, one of Czech history's greatest warriors, who is said to have never lost a battle.
A vengeful mother becomes the hunter in this gripping thriller. She lures her daughter's killer into her smart home for a twisted game of revenge.
Trucks and monsters come together to create a non-stop action adventure. A teenager forms a bond with a creature that's being hunted by an evil oil company and fights to save it.
BAFTA-winning director Joe Wright leads Keira Knightley in this period drama based on Jane Austen's classic novel. A rich single man falls for a woman who is beneath his class.
Rachel McAdams and Ryan Gosling star in this romantic tearjerker. After being separated, a couple who are passionately in love get a second chance at happiness.
Contemporary and fun, this acclaimed rom-com sees native New Yorker Rachel Chu head to Singapore to meet her boyfriend's family, who, unbeknownst to her, are all super-rich elites.
The usually charming Hugh Grant plays a self-centred exec who treats his star employee like his nanny. She finally quits with hilarious consequences.
Dennis Quaid takes centre stage in this third film in the successful franchise. Yet another great white shark invades the opening ceremonies of a marine park in Florida.
Acclaimed filmmaker Yimou Zhang helms this historical fantasy starring Matt Damon. An elite force of warriors must save humanity from a horde of monstrous creatures.
The son of Zeus must leave his peaceful life behind and become a warrior once again when his father is kidnapped. He enlists the help of a warrior queen to take on Zeus' captors.
Emmy-winning actor Bob Odenkirk leads this action thriller as an unassuming man who is driven to the edge after a home invasion. He goes into a rage to protect his family.
Scarlett Johansson (Avengers) stars in this pulsating action film. A woman accidentally absorbs an experimental drug during a black-market deal and is turned into a killing machine.
There is no way out in this gripping survival thriller. Six strangers wake up in a cornfield to find they are thrust into a deadly cat-and-mouse game with something mysterious.
There is no way out in this gripping survival thriller. Six strangers wake up in a cornfield to find they are thrust into a deadly cat-and-mouse game with something mysterious.
Oscar winner Renée Zellweger reprises her role as unlikely heroine Bridget Jones, who, in this instalment, finds herself pregnant and only fifty percent sure of who the father could be.
Visionary director Christopher Nolan revisits the historical battle of Dunkirk in this Oscar-winning war drama about a devastating combat that turned the tide of World War II.
Jean Reno drives this charming and heartfelt story inspired by a true story. A heartbroken fisherman forms an unlikely bond with a penguin he rescued from an oil spill.
A game of cat and mouse unfolds in this exciting action movie. Oscar-winner Tommy Lee Jones is a US Marshal hunting down an escaped prisoner, played by Wesley Snipes.
Tom Hanks stars as a widower whose young son calls a radio station looking for a new wife for his depressed dad. An enduring romantic classic directed by Nora Ephron.
Mark Wahlberg and Rose Byrne star in this great comedy about family. A couple bites off more than they can chew when they adopt three foster children.

programmes.t: Bridget Jones: The Edge Of Reason
programmes.d: This sequel to the sweet romcom classic sees Bridget Jones finally in a stable relationship with Mark Darcy. But doubts brew when her ex-lover Daniel Cleaver returns.
Mel Gibson plays a fearless bomb expert in this cyber-thriller. An ex-hacker is forced to break into high-level banking institutions while having a bomb strapped to his chair.
Matt Damon stars in this film that expertly blends smarts, emotion and gritty action. A man wakes up with amnesia and learns he's a human weapon the CIA wants eliminated.

programmes.t: Godzilla X Kong: The New Empire
programmes.d: The epic battle continues. This time, the mighty Kong and the fearsome Godzilla must unite against a colossal, undiscovered threat hidden within the planet.
Jeff Daniels stars in this crazy romcom about love, marriage, divorce and infatuation. A man must deal with the realities of his many strained relationships.
Angelina Jolie and James McAvoy push their bodies to the limit in this action blockbuster based on the hit comic book series about a secret league of superhuman assassins.
Almost unimaginable after the mega-success of 'Mad Max', the sequel came in bigger, better, bolder, securing Mel Gibson a place in the post-apocalyptic action genre forever.
Almost unimaginable after the mega-success of 'Mad Max', the sequel came in bigger, better, bolder, securing Mel Gibson a place in the post-apocalyptic action genre forever.
Meryl Streep, Steve Martin and Alec Baldwin star in this rom-com about a love triangle that sees a divorced woman have an affair with her ex-husband while dating another man.
A vengeful mother becomes the hunter in this gripping thriller. She lures her daughter's killer into her smart home for a twisted game of revenge.

programmes.t: Get Me To 21 The Jenna Lowe Story
programmes.d: A moving, inspiring, and informative documentary about Gabi Lowe and her family's four-year battle to save her terminally ill daughter Jenna.
In this classic coming-of-age story, a young girl with a morbid outlook on life becomes distressed when her widowed father falls for another woman.
A 13-year-old girl decides to do an assignment on her mother, but realises she doesn't know much about her. To find out all she can, she visits her uncle in LA.
This romantic comedy with an all-star cast follows the stories of couples, their make-ups, break-ups and all the expectations and pressures that Valentine's Day brings.
Trucks and monsters come together to create a non-stop action adventure. A teenager forms a bond with a creature that's being hunted by an evil oil company and fights to save it.
In a bid to keep their luxurious condo from their significant other, a couple's break-up proceeds to get uglier and nastier by the moment.
The third Mad Max film sees an exiled Mel Gibson and a tribe of kids battle Tina Turner in a swirl of stunning stunts, gladiatorial fighting, and general post-nuclear mayhem.
The second in this highly successful action franchise sees Matt Damon reprise his role as a former CIA assassin. This time, he's forced to resume his former life after being framed.
Christoph Waltz stars as an ageing assassin forced to train his replacement. Asked to eliminate the top men of a rival crime syndicate, they realise their employer has other plans.
A thrilling mix of action, drama, and romance brings unforgettable stories to your screen.
The Card Counter.
The Card Counter.
Zone 414.
Pride & Prejudice.
Oblivion.
This explosive film won an Oscar for Original Song and earned Terrence Howard a nomination for his electric performance. Follow a pimp trying to escape 'the life' through hip-hop.
Sylvester Stallone stars in this action classic. A notorious cop and psychopathic killer who were cryogenically frozen are defrosted years later, with chilling results.
Denzel Washington stars alongside Viola Davis, who earned an Oscar for her role. This 50s drama navigates the complex relationship of a working-class African-American family.
M-Net Movies viewers become stars in this action comedy. After wrecking their boss's car, two friends are inspired by different movies to help get out of their mess.
An animation that is filled with hope and wonder. A young boy who doubts Santa's existence joins other kids on a magical train journey to the North Pole on Christmas Eve.
Morgan Freeman and Ashley Judd star in this sequel about friendship as a group of people in a marine hospital try and help a dolphin find a companion.
The laughs keep coming in this animated superhero adventure. A cooler-than-ever Batman discovers that he's accidentally adopted a teenage orphan who wants to become his sidekick.
A musical adventure filled with heart, hilarity and happiness. When their village is invaded by the grumpy Bergens, two mismatched friends must work together to save the day.
Entertainment Queen Latifah stars in this humorous holiday movie. Diagnosed with a terminal illness, she takes a vacation, but gets far more than she bargained for.
This prequel to the trilogy tells an intriguing origin story of a young Coriolanus Snow, 64 years before his reign.
Liam Neeson must save his family in this action thriller. A bank executive receives a bomb threat while driving his children to school that his car will explode if they leave.
Owen Wilson stars in this chaotic romcom. Two men are given a week off from marriage by their wives, with the freedom to do whatever they want with whoever they want.
You never understand a person until you walk in their shoes. In this funny film, a racist whose daughter dates a black man wakes up in a black man's body.
You never understand a person until you walk in their shoes. In this funny film, a racist whose daughter dates a black man wakes up in a black man's body.
Adam Sandler proves his versatility in this buddy action comedy that sees a small-time thief forced to team up with a cop that once betrayed him, played by Damon Wayans.
A gripping drama thriller. When an investment broker learns the power of hypnosis, he uses this skill to get what he wants, leading him to something he didn't see coming.
This thriller sees Bruce Willis embroiled in a deadly situation. A retired cop steps in to save a hiker who witnesses a crime committed by rogue cops.
A touching and inspiring biopic focused on the life of a prominent US freedom fighter. Harriet Tubman escapes slavery and devotes her life to abolishing the practice.
A picture-perfect adventure awaits Kate Winslet and Cameron Diaz in this sweet rom-com. Two women swap homes for the holidays - and learn a few lessons in love.
Freddie Prinze Jr. (Head Over Heels) stars in this high school romcom. After a popular boy in school gets dumped, he makes a bet that he can turn a nerd into a prom queen.
Television's favourite babies get their own feature film, and it is filled with a whole lot of trouble as Tommy, Chuckie and the gang get themselves lost in the forest.
A star-studded cast ensures this Academy Award-nominated classic will amuse adults and kids alike. A prehistoric family goes on the journey of a lifetime.
A laugh-a-minute South African comedy about love and rivalry. A young couple falls for each other - despite their families' best efforts to keep them apart.
A great ensemble cast shows that you're never too old to follow your dreams. A group of elderly women from a retirement community form a cheerleading squad and enter a competition.
East meets West in this epic Asian fantasy film. Matrix star Keanu Reeves leads a group of 47 warriors into battle against deadly mystical forces.
The saying, 'desperate times call for desperate measures', proves true in this action-packed film. Four Black women resort to robbing banks to end their struggles.
Vin Diesel is a man driven by revenge in this action movie. When a drug cartel kills the wife of a successful DEA agent, he takes matters into his own hands and hunts them down.
Vin Diesel is a man driven by revenge in this action movie. When a drug cartel kills the wife of a successful DEA agent, he takes matters into his own hands and hunts them down.
An all-star cast drives this crazy comedy about family greed. Two sisters try to win over their wealthy aunt in hopes of inheriting, but their family members also have the same idea.

programmes.t: The Last Voyage Of The Demeter
programmes.d: A terrifying story based on a chapter from Bram Stoker's 'Dracula' novel. A cargo ship sets sail from Carpathia to London, but soon the trip turns into a fight for survival.
Ethan Hawke takes on a dual role in this gripping war thriller. An American soldier stationed in Rome must stop an imminent terrorist threat to the Vatican.
Vin Diesel (Furious 7) reprises his role as Riddick for this pulsating sequel to the cult classic. He battles the Necromongers, an evil empire intent on ruling the universe.

programmes.t: Sherlock Holmes: A Game Of Shadows
programmes.d: Robert Downey Jr and Jude Law return for another action-packed mystery. This time Holmes is on the trail of Professor Moriarty who is committing crimes across Europe.
A fun family film. When Ella encounters Joey, a baby kangaroo, she has no idea that Joey has a magical diamond that crooks are after, leading her on a quest to get Joey to safety.
This upbeat, endearing, musical comedy earned Jack Black a Golden Globe nomination as he gave a class of preppy students a music lesson in rock and roll they'll never forget.
An enchanting family animation. Mosley rebels from a life of servitude to uncover the origins of his species after learning that his fellow thoriphants used to stand upright.
Denzel Washington stars in this Spike Lee crime drama. A seasoned detective, a bank robber and a bank president face off in a high stakes hostage situation.
Kevin Hart delivers a livewire performance in this buddy-cop comedy about a security guard trying to prove himself to his girlfriend's top cop brother (Ice Cube).
All hell breaks loose in this action comedy starring John Cena and Alison Brie. An ex-special forces operative is hired to protect a journalist as she interviews a dictator.
Oscar winner Denzel Washington stars in this crime driven biopic set in the 70s. A hard, honest cop works to take down a new heroin kingpin who has secured the underworld.
Dwayne Johnson leads this larger-than-life monster movie. After animals are infected by a dangerous pathogen, a primatologist and a geneticist team up to stop their deadly rampage.
Dwayne Johnson leads this larger-than-life monster movie. After animals are infected by a dangerous pathogen, a primatologist and a geneticist team up to stop their deadly rampage.
An action-packed thriller about a petty criminal attempting to flee with cocaine and money he stole from a ruthless crime boss. He is badly wounded and has few choices to survive.
A gritty, action-packed film. A former police officer puts aside his differences with the force and teams up with a younger detective to find his brother's murderer.
This tragic Oscar-nominated romantic drama gives two lost lovers another chance. After twenty years apart, childhood sweethearts reunite for one fateful week in New York City.

programmes.t: Sinbad: Legend Of The Seven Seas
programmes.d: Brad Pitt and Catherine Zeta-Jones star in this animation. The legendary Sinbad embarks on a dangerous journey. He must clear his name after being framed by the goddess Eris.
The beloved cartoon character gets his own comedy. When a documentary filmmaker arrives at Jellystone Park to shoot a project, she quickly crosses paths with the infamous Yogi Bear.

programmes.t: Journey To The Center Of The Earth
programmes.d: Josh Hutcherson (The Hunger Games) has an unforgettable adventure in this fantasy film about a boy and his uncle who take a thrilling trip beneath the earth's surface.
It's chaos from start to finish in the live-action version of a cartoon favourite. While being his usual menace to the neighbourhood, Dennis must take on a cat burglar.
Chuckie and the whole gang go on an overseas adventure in their full-length movie. Chuckie is on a mission to find a new mom before his dad marries an evil businesswoman.
An uplifting animation. A group of 'ugly' dolls leaves their home Uglyville and goes into the world, where they learn that they are different. They embark on a journey of self-love.
The madness continues in this sequel to the hit South African rom-com. It is a week before Jodi and Prishen's wedding and their love is tested as the family interfere once more.
Rowan Atkinson returns as the bumbling secret agent and takes on another mission. He must stop a group of international assassins before they eliminate a world leader.
Ice Cube and Kevin Hart return for another crime comedy filled with drugs, wedding bells and ridiculous antics. All hell breaks loose when the two travel to Miami for a drug bust.
In this action-packed crime drama, Pierce Brosnan is a fixer with a problem. The thug he whacked is missing his head, and Charlie will only be paid if the body can be identified.
Ice Cube and Chris Tucker star in a comedy classic that looks at the lighter side of life in the ghetto through the eyes of two friends who have gotten themselves into trouble.
Ice Cube and Chris Tucker star in a comedy classic that looks at the lighter side of life in the ghetto through the eyes of two friends who have gotten themselves into trouble.
Vinnie Jones leads this crime thriller. A high-stakes money laundering deal between London mobsters and a West Virginia oilman turns sour after an incident.
You never understand a person until you walk in their shoes. In this funny film, a racist whose daughter dates a black man wakes up in a black man's body.
Oscar winners Russell Crowe and Ben Affleck lead a great cast in this drama. After a congressional aide is killed, a journalist starts looking at the case, unearthing dark secrets.

S1 E1 Moving the Mose
Constant high water has been eroding the city of Venice for decades. The construction of a surge barrier against the tides is nearing completion.

S1 E2 Jumboisation
Learn the engineers and mechanics stories behind some of the world's largest lifting and moving equipment.
S1 E8 Mat Watson crosses Europe in search of the ultimate seventies sports car, as he hunts down the iconic Porsche 911.
S1 E7 Mat Watson is asked to track down a Fiat 500 for a client with a tiny garage, but finding a good example of this little motor proves a massive challenge.

S5 E11 Electrified
Bugatti Veyron Vitesse, CaddyTrek, EH Line Crawler bike and Zero S Motorcycle.

S5 E12 Land And Sea
The ERod roadster from Switzerland the Snow Ped, a futuristic snowmobile and the pontoon-propelled Schiller nautical bike.

S3 E7 Racing Around Town
Today it's all about going fast and looking good at the same time, with a 1963 Porsche 356B, a modern Ford GT and a sporty Studebaker.

S3 E8 Muscle in Auburn
What's My Car Worth returns to Auburn for Auctions America's massive Fall gathering. A GTO Judge with 70 kilometres on the clock highlights the show.

S3 E9 Detroit Iron Calling
Classic Detroit iron shows up in Auburn, to the delight of Keith and Donald. One of the earliest muscle cars rolls on the set.

S3 E10 Renting History
Keith and Donald go old school with a 1934 Auburn Twelve, a car that can make anyone feel rich. They also take a look at one of the most coveted rental cars of all time.

S1 E3 Traces of the Pharaohs of Luxor
Luxor is home to the Karnak complex, the Temple of Denderah, and the million-year-old castle of Ramses II. New technology reveals treasures engulfed by the Nile.

programmes.t: The Hunt For The Slave Ship Guerrero
programmes.d: A team of underwater archeologists searches for the remains of the Guerrero, an illegal slave ship sunk in battle off the coast of Florida.

programmes.t: Napoleon - The Beginning Of The End
programmes.d: On June 26, 1813, two powerful men gathered in Dresden to discuss the future of war and peace in Europe.

'The History of Home Presents... History's Greatest Homes. S1/E4 - Monticello'. Welcome to Thomas Jefferson's Monticello. We explore inside and out to find out why this unique house was the great passion of Jefferson's life.

'The History of Home Presents... History's Greatest Homes. S1/E2 - Hearst Castle'. In this episode, we pull back the curtain on the fascinating history behind one of America's most iconic homes, Hearst Castle.

S1 E1 Lightning
Nigel reveals an incredible device designed in the 1800s by Nikola Tesla that makes lightning and finds out what it is like to be struck by a lightning bolt.

S1 E2 Explosions
Perhaps Nigel can walk away from a contrived movie explosion in slow motion like an action hero, but can he walk away from a real explosion?

S1 E3 Weather
Nigel looks at the Science of Extreme Weather. Does a hat really make a difference in the freezing cold? Should you walk or run in the rain?

S1 E4 Collisions
Nigel crashes a small, modern car with a five-star safety rating into a large, heavy and old car to find out which one you and your family would be safest in.

S1 E5 Fire
Nigel shows us the science of exactly what it takes to start a fire and experiences first-hand what it's like to be inside a burning house - by burning down a house.

S1 E6 Space
Nigel's mission: To explore strange new worlds, to seek out new life and new civilizations to boldly go where no television presenter, has gone before.

S1 E7 Sound
Nigel tries to break the sound barrier and ends up breaking all kinds of other stuff along the way.

S1 E8 Gravity
Nigel takes on Galileo and tests the law of gravity by jumping out of a plane with an orange to see which will hit the ground first.
Follow the minutes leading to the 2019 White Island volcanic eruption, which killed 22 and left 26 injured. Witnesses recount the disaster and scientists investigate.
This movie shows the complicated dynamics between public and private interests in the 'New Space'.

S1 E7 'S1/E7 - WIFI. The Hollywood Actress Who Laid the Groundwork For Wi-Fi'. Actress Hedy Lamarr, 'the world's most beautiful woman,' had a knack for inventing during WWII devising technology to aid the Allies.

S2 E2 The Suffragettes: Battle For The Ballot Box
In late Victorian England, women began to organise to gain the right to vote. The fight for women's suffrage lasted well into the early 20th Century.

S1 E2 Female Inventors
Discovery, invention, creation, and exploration may involve risks, but who were the women who fearlessly faced the unknown?

S1 E3 Queens For Life
In the last 200 years, 2 women have sat on the British throne for two-thirds of the time - find out what it takes to be a royal success.
Childhood curiosity can build a lifelong passion for the natural world. What is special about women's connection to the wild?

S1 E1 Sigrun's Wrath And The Discovery Of Iceland
Viking women commanded ships and settled colonies. They took up arms and negotiated with emperors.

S1 E2 Jova's Heritage And The Fall Of Haithabu
Viking influence stretches from the Baltic to the Black Sea in 1072.

The evolution of super-colonies allowed social insects to dominate the planet. We show how they arose and why they're so important to our own survival.

S1 E1 Life In The Seas
The first life forms on the planet were microscopic, single-celled organisms, it took billions of years before more complex creatures evolved.

S1 E2 Journey To Land
Life evolved in the sea, in a water-bound planet, but landmasses slowly appeared and aquatic life began to explore different ways to colonize it.
Forests are dense, dark habitats, a realm of shadows, ideal for predators to stalk, whether its mink on the forest floor, goshawks in the canopy.
The endless plains of East Africa is a paradise for lions. The most social of all cats, lions form prides that are unlike any other animals.

S1 E2 Part Two: The Next Generation
We discover all the ingenious ways that insects track down mates and how they give the next generation the best start in life.

S1 E1 Origins

S1 E3 Rise Of the Giants
It took a long time for vertebrates to really take over the land, but once they did, there was no turning back.

S1 E4 Snowball's Chance
While demolishing an old farmhouse, the Priestly team uncovers a hidden historic treasure.

S1 E5 Bowled Over
Ted's new salvage job is a blast from the past: a classic bowling alley, Ryan leads his team on a high-stakes overnight highway bridge demolition.

S16 E7 Secrets Of The Sumerians
The ancient Sumerians established what is considered the world's first civilization, and they credited their extraordinary achievements to their gods, the Anunnaki.

S16 E9 Mysteries Of Scotland
For years, Scotland has been an epicentre of otherworldly phenomena. It is home to ancient stone circles, stories of strange beings and a major hotspot for UFO sightings.

S16 E8 The Ufo Superhighway
Along the Earth's north 37th parallel there have been so many reports of UFO's and other mysterious events that it has been dubbed The UFO Superhighway.

S16 E10 Mystery Of The Stone Spheres
There are mysterious ancient stones shaped into perfect spheres. Many of them show clear evidence of being manmade and some completely defy explanation.

S2 E6 Keep Your Friends Close And The Veterans Closer
Paul and Bogart declare storage war on the veterans at an auction in Orillia. Roy cadges a ride off them instead. Ursula has a bad hair day.

S2 E7 Knock-Out Punch
Roy is up to his usual antics at an auction in the Old Weston neighbourhood of Toronto - only this time, Ursula strikes back with full force.

S2 E8 Worst Laid Plans
Don and the guys are in an upmarket area of Toronto for another auction. Roy is on the lookout for high end items, but will he be able to scupper Rick and Cindy?

S2 E10 Roy Marks His Territory
Tensions are still running high between Roy and Ursula at an auction in Thornhill. Roy brings his dog for support, while Ursula does her best to ignore them.

S2 E11 Kennys Vs Kennys
Roy brings along Bogart's sisters to try and throw him off at the auction. Meanwhile, Ursula is in a bad mood and the others try to take advantage.

S2 E13 Schlock Therapy
Roy antagonises the buyers at an auction in Don Mills with free psychological analysis. Ursula tries to rein in Paul's reckless bidding habits while Bogart's away making wedding plans.

S2 E14 Cougar Pants
Cindy and Rick go on the prowl for fresh lockers at an auction in downtown Toronto. Unforeseen expenses force Ursula to reconsider her attitude towards stripping. Roy crashes hard.

S1 E5 Holy Riches
The legendary treasures of the Copper Scroll, King Solomon's mines, and the Syamantaka Gem have captivated the world for centuries. But could these fortunes still be out there, waiting to be discovered?

S1 E6 Hidden Wonders
Most of the world's holiest places sit in plain sight. But there are some hidden deep underground. Why were they concealed? And what mysteries have we unearthed in these subterranean sacred spaces?

S1 E7 Mysterious Sacred Structures
England's Stonehenge and the Moai statues of Easter Island have inspired awe for centuries. But will we ever fully understand how and why these structures came to be?

S1 E8 Mystifying Cursed Objects
Ancient cultures around the world have aroused fascination, and provoked fear with curses and objects used to conjure them. But is there proof that some might have actually worked?

S2 E1 Beyond Heaven And Hell
What happens to us after we die? From heaven and hell to resurrection and reincarnation, we'll explore the remarkable possibilities of life after death.

S2 E6 The Cryptid Mystery
Ancient accounts of monstrous creatures appear in cultures across the globe. From Egypt's animalistic deities to sea monsters like Kraken, and Hydra.

S16 E6 The Top Ten Alien Disasters
Counting down the top ten disasters ever documented with a possible otherworldly connection, from a flying monster at a nuclear incident, to a meteor that wiped out the dinosaurs.

S5 E3 Bigfoot Train Sighting, Jesus And Aliens, & Iceland's Loch Ness Monster
Are the spirits of soldiers still haunting the most famous Civil War battleground?

S6 E17 Secrets Of The Sphinx
Rising from the sands of the Egyptian desert is one of the ancient world's greatest wonders-the mighty Sphinx. This mythological creature, with the head of a human and the body of a lion.

S1 E1 England
England's castle walls have witnessed centuries of bloodshed. This programme presents spine tingling stories in a riveting tour of England's ghostly heritage.
S1 E1 The de Havilland Comet introduced jet travel over the Mediterranean, but a series of accidents led to investigations into reasons like human error, mechanical failure, and even UFOs.

S2 E10 Pickin' Night In Canada
First up, they dig into Canada's longest-running bar and pull out nine tables from the tavern owned by Henri 'Pocket Rocket' Richard.

programmes.t: The Hunt: In Search Of Australia's...
programmes.d: 'The Hunt: In Search Of Australia's Big Cats. S1/E1 - 1/1'. Panthers and pumas are alive and well in the Australian bush and Vaughan King is on a quest to prove it.

'Junk & Disorderly: Henry's Wreck-Trospective. S1/E6 - The Fairford Wreck-Trospective'. This time, Henry and Guy buy a jaw-dropping assortment of signs and cans and quickly get to work restoring them.

S24 E6 Pawned Lightnin'
Rick and Corey take a spin in the classic car Hell's Chariot, from the movie 'Grease'. Is the flaming hotrod the one that they want, or will they 'drop out' of the deal?

S24 E7 Blast From The Past
A customer walks in with a Tommy Boy film poster signed by actor Chris Farley. Meanwhile, Rick tries not to slip up making a deal on a pair of WW2 snow shoes.

S24 E8 Fender Vendor
When Rick takes a swing at a Honus Wagner baseball card, will it be the real deal? Chum strums a custom Fender by popular guitar maker John Carruthers.

S24 E9 Pawntourage
Things go nuclear when a Japanese Godzilla toy hits the counter. Can Corey come out on top before he's crushed? Next, Chum does battle over a leather jacket from WW2 - but will his offer bomb?

S2 E1 Bigger Stronger Meaner Dumber
Roy hires bodyguards to keep the riffraff away at an auction in Brampton. Bogart quits... but can Paul pull him back in? Rick and Cindy make a discovery, and Ursula gets carried away.

S2 E2 That's Mr Pecker To You
Roy's arch-nemesis, auctioneer Patrick Pecker, calls an auction on Weston Road. While Roy seeks to lift the curse, Ursula works her charm. Meanwhile, Bogart reads Paul the riot-shirt.

S8 E36 Judge's Takeover: Ben Abbott
In this special competition, every aspect of the challenge will be decided by two-time champion Ben Abbott. Four smiths must recreate the billhook knife, a weapon dear to Ben's heart.

S8 E38 Damascus 500
Four smiths hit the fast track in a race to make a Damascus blade with the highest layer count. The winner will get extra time in round two, and the loser with the lowest layer count will be eliminated.

S1 E4 Forgotten Cities And Lost Sanctuaries
Each episode combines CGI, expert testimony, and location shooting to examine extraordinary finds brought to light by disasters ranging from earthquakes to droughts and floods.

S13 E3 Billion Dollar Baby
After the team makes an ancient discovery on Lot 5, they learn that the fabled treasure could be worth more than anyone imagined.

Roy antagonises the buyers at an auction in Don Mills with free psychological analysis. Ursula tries to rein in Paul's reckless bidding habits while Bogart's away making wedding plans.

S2 E14 Cougar Pants

S2 E15 Confessions Of A Dangerous Mime
Much to his own amusement (and no one else's), Roy brings a mime to an auction. Rick and Cindy arrive in a fouler mood than usual, and Bogart hopes to whip Paul into shape.

S1 E2 Tinley Park
A strange formation is seen in the sky over the sleepy suburbs of Tinley Park. The lights return for a second time almost to the date the following year.

S2 E2 Sacred Strongholds
There are strongholds built to protect the sacred, like an impenetrable wall or a mystical river. But there are others used for more sinister purposes.

S8 E41 Judges Takeover: Dave Baker
In this special competition, four smiths must recreate one of renowned Hollywood weapons maker Dave Baker's favourite weapons, the Bone Daddy Fantasy Seax.

S8 E46 Beat The Unbeaten: Round One
Competitor turned judge Ben Abbott remains undefeated in the forge, but that could soon change. In the first part of a five-episode challenge, three smiths compete in one five-hour round.

S24 E11 Maximum Pawnage
Chum finds a 1920s Baccarat bottle for Ybry perfume. Rick examines a sealed 'Spiderman and Venom: Maximum Carnage' video game. Corey evaluates an 1800s gambling kit.

S2 E16 Utopia?
The buyers head to the tiny hamlet of Utopia, hoping that the auction lives up to its name. Roy has a pocket full of cash and he's not afraid to bribe, and Ursula runs afoul of some fowl.

S2 E17 Three Kennys Are Worse Than None
Paul and Bogart arrive at an auction in Brampton with their new 'secret weapon': Paul's hopelessly inexperienced brother Barry.

S2 E18 Instigator In Training
Roy shows his nephew what being an instigator is all about at an auction in South Etobicoke. Bogart wants a new catchphrase, but even Paul thinks it's silly.

S2 E2 Million Mummy Necropolis & The Enigmatic Horseshoe
An ancient cemetery in Egypt yields over a million naturally preserved burials. In France, a horseshoe-shaped monument reveals links to ancient weaponry and ritual.

S10 E17 Junkyard Meltdown
After an intense couple of rounds, two smiths head back to their home forge to recreate a complex Broadsword featuring an unusual snake-shaped grind.

A chronological telling of the dramatic D-Day story, focusing on the vessels that made the landings possible.

S1 E2 The First Metal Warships
The US became a global superpower when the USS Olympia won the Battle of Manila Bay. Plus, the British HMS Dreadnought brought ship design into the 20th century.

S1 E4 Sedona
A sacred place, Sedona is known for its unusual occurrences. With all the activity that's been recorded here, it could double for an intergalactic airport. But what is drawing UFOs to this spot?

S1 E5 The Pine Barrens
Built on swamp and sandy loam, all that grows here are the weeds of civilisation. But what is it about this barren land with its pygmy pines, and high winds that is attracting alien attention?

S24 E12 Yay Or Neigh?
When a rare H.G. Wells book find its way to the shop, will Corey shoot for the stars? There's no horsing around when a statue made of turquoise moseys on in. Will it be a yay, or a neigh for Rick?

S2 E19 Goji, Bogie And The Yogi
Bogart's hooked on the revitalising powers of goji berry juice, and he plans to spread the word at an auction in Milton. Roy arrives in white, looking to spread peace, joy and distraction.

S2 E20 Exceedingly Loud And Uncomfortably Close
Roy aims to throw other buyers off by invading their personal space at an auction in Mississauga. Paul and Bogart are clueless about finding a gift for Bogart's fiancée.

S2 E21 Pranking The Monkeys
Roy makes mischief at an auction in Toronto with a full assortment of classic pranks. Rick and Cindy resort to flashing to grab Don's attention.

S1 E3 Hanoi Hilton
The Hanoi Hilton is perhaps the most famous American POW prison of the Vietnam War located in the city of Hanoi. In Vietnamese its name literally means 'hell hole'.

S1 E4 Sing Sing
A maximum-security prison on the banks of the Hudson, just 30 miles north of New York City, it gave rise to the term 'being sent up the river'.

S1 E6 Rattenkrieg
From the Indian border in Burma to China, which has been at war with Japan since 1937, the war grows more savage. In Europe, Hitler renews his assault on the Soviet Union.

S1 E5 Torpedo Boats At War
John F Kennedy first made news in 1943 when, as a skipper of a torpedo boat in the Pacific, he and his crew were shipwrecked. We tell the story of their rescue.

S1 E6 Cold War Warriors
Follow a new perspective on the military, political and domestic issues of the time, whilst revealing human stories and engineering marvels.

S1 E6 Falkirk Triangle
With more than 300 UFO sightings each year, the townspeople living within the Falkirk Triangle can't help but feel uneasy about the strange occurrences.

S1 E7 New Mexico
There is high strangeness on the Archuleta Mesa. And it's no wonder, what with the whisperings of an underground alien base. A near neighbour to Roswell, could Area 51 have been a decoy all along?

For years, cultures around the world have held a belief in stargates through which beings have traveled to Earth from distant points in the universe and even other dimensions.

S16 E13 The Whistleblowers
For decades, incredible claims have been made about an extraterrestrial presence on Earth and the government has gone to great lengths to discredit them.

S1 E3 Hanoi Hilton
The Hanoi Hilton is perhaps the most famous American POW prison of the Vietnam War located in the city of Hanoi. In Vietnamese its name literally means 'hell hole'.

S1 E4 Sing Sing
A maximum-security prison on the banks of the Hudson, just 30 miles north of New York City, it gave rise to the term 'being sent up the river'.

S1 E6 Rattenkrieg
From the Indian border in Burma to China, which has been at war with Japan since 1937, the war grows more savage. In Europe, Hitler renews his assault on the Soviet Union.

S1 E5 Torpedo Boats At War
John F Kennedy first made news in 1943 when, as a skipper of a torpedo boat in the Pacific, he and his crew were shipwrecked. We tell the story of their rescue.

S1 E6 Cold War Warriors
Follow a new perspective on the military, political and domestic issues of the time, whilst revealing human stories and engineering marvels.

S2 E4 Beasts Unleashed
Legendary beasts are believed to terrorise, kill, and even possess humans. But are these creatures merely metaphors or is there proof they've actually been unleashed to wreak havoc?

S8 E49 Beat The Unbeaten: Back For Revenge
Two of the smiths who faced competitor turned judge Ben Abbott in his first competition are back to seek their revenge.

S8 E50 Beat The Unbeaten: The Final Showdown
Competitor turned Judge Ben Abbott still remains undefeated in the forge with a record of 8-0, but two smiths handpicked by Doug and Dave want to change that.

S24 E13 There's No Crying In Pawn Stars
Chum tries to put his best foot forward when a Nike Lebron sneaker hits the counter. Rick keeps a close watch on a seller who comes in with a signed Pulp Fiction poster.

S2 E22 All Aboard The Party Train!
The epic bachelor party Roy has planned for Bogart is all anyone can talk about at an auction in the Bridle Path area of Toronto. Ursula is not amused.

S2 E23 Freaks And Greeks
New buyer Tommy is larger than life, very proud of his Greek heritage, and looking for a big score at an auction in Brampton.

S2 E24 Honeymoon Capital Of The Storage World
The buyers attend an auction in one of Canada's most famous tourist destinations: Niagara Falls. Rick and Cindy wonder if Cindy will be recognised in her hometown.
'Junk & Disorderly: Henry's Wreck-Trospective. S1/E7 - The Ardingly Wreck-Trospective'. Henry and Sam stumble upon an unusual Bomb Bug and get to work restoring it and getting it ready for sale.

S2 E11 Over A Barrel
The Pickers hit Niagara Falls on their hunt for big deals. Their first stop finds them in the middle of the strip staring down a collector's memorabilia and bizarre pieces.

S1 E7 Rescue Ships
Two rescues ended in tragedy - the sinking of the hospital ship Britannic, and the Lancastria in 1940. In the 19th century, USS Constellation chased down slave ships.

S1 E8 The Smallest Ships Of War
The Smithsonian has a small 1776 wooden gunboat, built to stop a British invasion and two Japanese midget submarines were part of the attack on Pearl Harbour.

S1 E8 California
Records show California has the most UFO sightings. From Joshua Tree, where people have reported more sightings per capita to Mount Shasta, whose residents experience the longest visitations.

S1 E1 Close Encounters
There is no safe place. Every day, all around the world, in the most ordinary places, regular people are spotting UFOs.

programmes.t: The Twisted Timeline Of Sammy And Raj
programmes.d: S1 E20 When the boys accidentally break a family heirloom they must find a way to fix it and put it out of harms way for good. But how? It's been in the family for decades!
S3 E2 When Doris the Dolphin asks a favor of Kowalski, he instantly jumps to her rescue, only to find out it's to free her brother Francis - who happens to be Dr. Blowhole.

S1 E12 Bad Eggs/Out of Bounds
Best and Bester are a pair of twins who live in a weird alternate reality where your neighbour could be a pair of disgruntled trousers or a floating cloud of bottom burp.

The Turtles are baited by an unknown enemy into deadly traps.

S1 E8 Unbarfable/Game On
Sanjay and Craig vow to make Hector barf for the first time ever. The search is on when Sanjay and Craig's favourite video game goes AWOL.
S10 E9 When SpongeBob cooks at home, customers leave the Krusty Krab and head for SpongeBob's place./ SpongeBob teaches Plankton how to win his computer wife back.
SpongeBob and Patrick try to prove their life insurance protects them from danger!/ When SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat, everyone in town wants one.
S10 E1 Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town!/ When SpongeBob accidentally picks up Neptune's trident, there's no telling what trouble he may cause!
S12 E2 SpongeBob must figure out how to do his job after accidentally shrinking himself./ Squidward invents a new sport to get back at SpongeBob and Patrick for annoying him.

S6 E22 Single Cell Anniversary
SpongeBob helps Plankton find the perfect anniversary gift for Karen.
S10 E3 SpongeBob mistakes an escaped convict for his driving instructor. When Krabs sends him searching for a missing toy, SpongeBob finds himself lost... in the lost and found!
S10 E4 Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but has to get to the store to use it!/ Krabs buys Squidward's art, but plans to make a profit.
S8 E53 When Squidward gets hurt at work, he threatens legal action unless Mr. Krabs caters to him hand and foot./ Mr. Krabs and Plankton may finally agree on something!

S9 E183 Eek, An Urchin!
After getting his groceries stolen, Squidward convinces SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate.
S8 E64 The night before the school dance, Mr. Krabs asks SpongeBob to help Pearl get rid of a barnacle on her face./ SpongeBob asks Patrick to pet-sit Gary while he's away.

S1 E7 What About Meep?
When an unsatisfied anchovy strays from his brothers, SpongeBob and Patrick must help him find his true identity.

S1 E16 Night of the Living Stench
When all the campers try to win the 'Stinkiest Camp in the Forest' award, Squidward has to fend for his life to stay clean.

S2 E4 Space Ping Pong!
After Auntie Freeze makes a frosty escape from Happy Camp, the bunnies track her down and discover an ice cold family reunion.
Dora and Boots babysit some rowdy crocs. Dora and Boots get the Troll to try an empanada at Benny's stand.
Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois are whale watching when the Flounder hits a rock and starts to sink!/ Stowaway penguins have scattered around Adventure Bay!

S3 E4 Pups Save Alex's Mini-Patrol/Pups Save A Lost Tooth
Alex loses his first tooth, but misplaces it! The PAW Patrol needs to help him find it so he can get a visit from the Tooth Fairy!
S12 E6 SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails.

S15 E9 Bad Luck Bob
SpongeBob experiences a bad luck streak when his lucky tie clip suddenly goes missing.
S12 E3 Squidward packs his bags after his house gets infested./ SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady.

programmes.t: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja...
programmes.d: The East River 3 are on the verge of victory! The Turtles and Mutanimals must team up to stop them, but not everything is as it seems.

S4 E3 A Tinkle In Time
After following the sound of Patrick's voice into the Time Closet, Tinkle stumbles on a time-travelling adventure.

S1 E3 Pat-a-thon
Patrick hosts a telethon to raise money for snails who can't dance.

S2 E10 Patrick's Star
Patrick gets a star as a gift for his birthday but soon discovers fatherhood can be troubling for the unprepared.

S2 E12 Parasite Pals
SpongeBob's newest friend is a parasite in his stomach, but tensions rise when its appetite threatens all of camp!
S3 E14 Pt 1: Hearing about a contest to find El Falcon's next sidekick, Carl becomes El Pollito and tries to win!
S3 E15 Sid faces off against Lisa Loud in the Great Lakes City robotics competition, With a deadline and no inspiration, Frida tries to use Lalo's paintings as her own!

S6 E8 Plankton's Regular
Plankton has a customer who eats at the Chum Bucket every day.

S9 E1 Bulletin Board
SpongeBob erects a community bulletin board in the Krusty Krab, but anonymous reviews posted on it lead to trouble.
S6 E2 Mr. Krabs sees SpongeBob pick something up off the street, and thinks he's found a penny./ SpongeBob's boating school class is going on a field trip.

S4 E4 Two Pests in a Teapot
When Granny Tentacles goes out for a spa day, Patrick and Squidina take care of her house.
S2 E2 In an alternate universe, the Star family is a team of superheroes, or at least they think they are. Cecil works a new job as a security guard at Lady Upturn's museum.
Lemmy the robot returns from Mars, complete with an unwanted visitor. Alice over-chlorinates the otter habitat, and Marlene's fur gets bleached.
When a Baby Fossa is delivered to the Zoo everyone is excited except for King Julien.

S2 E2 Legend Sauce-Squatch!
Evil aliens make Steve pass various trials to get into their 'Cool Dudes Club'.
Counselor Squidward is determined for his cabin to win the annual camp art competition.

S1 E2 Enemies A La Mode
Patrick and GrandPat try to pass each other on the stairs, leading to a ludicrous conflict. // The members of the Star family each confront their own absurd rivalries.

S4 E4 Two Pests in a Teapot
When Granny Tentacles goes out for a spa day, Patrick and Squidina take care of her house.

S11 E2 Shopping List
Now that Fred's leg has healed, SpongeBob is determined to keep it out of harm's way./ Patrick's lemonade stand isn't doing well, until he gets help from Squidward.
S13 E3 When the circus comes to town and steals his customers away, Mr. Krabs tries to sabotage the show.

programmes.t: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish
programmes.d:
S1 E8 Peace Of Pizza
When Dev refuses to participate in Kindness Day, Hazel summons an intergalactic species of diplomats to reason with him.
S3 E11 Pt 1: Mr. Chang's job may go to a fast train conductor, proving he can be as fast as a robot! Pt 2: Adelaide wants to help the city cats clean up their act for adoption.
S3 E13 Bobby and Par are left in charge of Ziggy's shop. The family tries to stop their chismoso Hector from gossiping around town.

S1 E1 Late For Breakfast
Patrick presents a show about food after missing out on a hearty breakfast. // Patrick and SpongeBob experience the wonders of the workforce.

S1 E17 Patrick's Got An Alien Zoo Loose
A shape-shifting alien runs loose in the Star home.
S7 E51 A new neighbour moves in and becomes Squidward's best friend./ SpongeBob helps Squidward prepare for a date.

S7 E52 Big Sister Sam/Perfect Chemistry
Patrick's big sister Samantha comes for a visit./ Sandy and Plankton bond over their shared love.
S7 E30 Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees./ SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.
S7 E31 Squidward cleans up the city of Bikini Bottom with 'help' from SpongeBob/ SpongeBob brings Gary a pet that terrorizes him.
S1 E1 While trying to create identical pieces of popcorn, Ray and Henry accidentally a Popcorn Monster to life. To help Ray win the Swellview Drone Dash, Schwoz hatches a plan.

programmes.t: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja...
programmes.d: Raph's NEEDS to fight! He's good at it too, according to his new trainer Spuds.
Chloe's goodness drains the Anti-Fairy World Wand. Foop disguises himself to try and break her, Timmy takes Chloe to meet Mark Chang to prove to her aliens exist.
When Timmy and Chloe save Dark Laser's beloved pet, Flipsie, Dark Laser becomes bound to them, Timmy and Chloe wish up a girlfriend for Mr. Crocker.
Rico and King Julien form an unlikely friendship in 'Kaboom and Kabust', and then in 'The Helmet', King Julien causes chaos with Kowalski's new invention.
The Penguins are in the grip of Officer X. The Penguins discover that a kid on a zoo field trip has witnessed one of their secret missions.

programmes.t: Kung Fu Panda: Legends Of Awesomeness
programmes.d: When Po's friend Peng returns, Po isn't very excited. What no one knows is that Peng is Tai Lung's nephew. Now Po has to admit to Peng that he skadooshed his uncle.
Everyone races against time to stop Azula's sinister conquest of Ba Sing Se. Zuko and Katara spend time together, while Aang's destiny hangs in the balance.
S7 E32 SpongeBob and Patrick buy a toy and have to learn to share it./ SpongeBob goes with Mr. Krabs to the Cheapest Crab Convention.

S7 E34 SpongeBob's Last Stand
SpongeBob and Patrick protest the construction of a highway that would destroy Jellyfish Fields.
